title: WorkflowNode

nodeId.description: Unique identifier for this node within the WorkflowSpec.

workload.description: The WorkloadSpec describing the computation to run at this node.

inputs.description: Input DataRefs consumed by this node.

outputs.description: Output DataRefs produced by this node.

requiredObligations.description: Obligation names that must be active before this node may execute.

resources.description: Resource requirements (CPU, memory, GPU) for scheduling this workload.

description: A single computation step within a WorkflowSpec DAG, specifying the workload to execute, input and output data references, required obligations, and compute resource requirements.
